name: arrival-difficulty
description: Serverless web prototype for destination arrival difficulty, designed for Windows exe and Android apk packaging.

scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Serverless mode: open index.html directly in the browser.')"
scripts.android:init: npm install @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli @capacitor/android && npx cap init arrival-difficulty com.arrivaldifficulty.app --web-dir .
scripts.android:open: npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
